blended.narrative: Tremblant is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 53°F.
Wednesday: 6" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
